locator.quote: Shared-config mutation is an easy trap.

text: Shared-config mutation is an easy trap: merging overrides into config[reward] in place mutates a config object multiple agents share.

locator.quote: agents shared a config object — which is exactly what

text: The bug bites the moment two agents share a config object — which is exactly what PPOTrainer(config=self.config) does; fixed with copy-on-write + a no-mutation regression test.
